item.title:
willocallaghan: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 22min Great to have Charlie Mitchell back for his first game of the year.
Injuries
item.description:
Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 22min Great to have Charlie Mitchell back for his first game of the year.
Injuries have hit hard, especially in defence, but hopeful there’s a big performance in that group tomorrow. 5 741
